bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 7 day(s) · scope=morning-brief-editor (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 4 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-24 · [research_task] 监测ETF赎回与融资余额变动趋势

DONE

需核实明日若ETF仍出现净赎回且融资余额更新转弱，则应将今日行情视为轮动而非全面加仓。

  • Outcome: Used ETF margin weakening and financing-balance update as condition to treat the market as rotation rather than broad beta add.

2026-06-24 · [research_task] Check CPO/HBM volume convergence

DONE

Confirm if trading volume for high-volume chains (中际旭创, 新易盛, 天孚通信) has cooled down. Source: 仍待验证的问题

  • Outcome: research:中际旭创, 新易盛, 天孚通信 → completed | dir=sessions/fa0e4816-3afe-4a6f-8113-019bedf52436 | summary: 研究对象: 中际旭创, 新易盛, 天孚通信 | → 1 forecast(s) on 中际旭创, 新易盛, 天孚通信, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: 中际旭创, 新易盛, 天孚通信

  • Outcome: research:中际旭创, 新易盛, 天孚通信 → completed | dir=sessions/fa0e4816-3afe-4a6f-8113-019bedf52436 | summary: 研究对象: 中际旭创, 新易盛, 天孚通信 | → 1 forecast(s) on 中际旭创, 新易盛, 天孚通信, 0 position(s) opened

2026-06-24 · [research_task] 监控 10Y CGB 收益率“红灯”预警信号

DONE

跟踪 10Y CGB 是否连续 2-3 个交易日收于 1.73% 下方，或有效突破 1.70% 并伴随货币政策正式转向。

  • Outcome: research:10Y CGB → completed | dir=sessions/01079274-6c36-4892-bfed-02717fc63060 | summary: 研究对象: 10Y CGB

2026-06-24 · [research_task] 监控10Y国债收益率‘红灯’预警信号

DONE

Monitor 10Y CGB for 2-3 consecutive days below 1.73% or a break below 1.70% to decide on defensive allocation as per Section 3.3.

  • Outcome: research:10Y CGB → completed | dir=sessions/01079274-6c36-4892-bfed-02717fc63060 | summary: 研究对象: 10Y CGB
